title: T-028 — Wiring: Daily consolidator cron + R15 D365 adapter + dispatcher worker (§12.3, §12.4, §12.5)
prompt:
# T-028 — Daily consolidator + R15 adapter + D365 dispatcher

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §12.3 daily consolidation job (cron 23:00 UTC); §12.4 R15 anti-corruption adapter; §12.5 retry schedule + DLQ; §12.7 reconciliation; §15.1 NFR (daily consolidator <60s for 1000 WOs, D365 post 500 lines <5s); §15.2 graceful degradation.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Three components:
1. Cron job (apps/worker) running at 23:00 UTC (configurable per finance_settings.d365_consolidation_cutoff_time): groups pending finance.wo_cost.closed events by (cost_center_id, currency_id, gl_account) → emits a single finance.daily_journal.ready event with consolidated lines.
2. R15 anti-corruption adapter `@monopilot/d365-finance-adapter`: maps internal canonical (PRD §12.4 lines 1082-1104) → D365 F&O JournalLineEntity payload (§12.4 lines 1106-1140); reads gl_account_mappings + d365_constants.
3. Dispatcher worker: picks finance_outbox_events status='pending' WHERE target_system='d365_f&o' → calls adapter → POSTs to D365 DMF endpoint → updates status + retry per §12.5 schedule (immediate, +5m, +30m, +2h, +12h, +24h → DLQ).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/worker/src/finance/daily-consolidator.ts`:
   - Schedule: `pg_cron` job 'finance_daily_consolidator' invoking SECURITY DEFINER fn or directly cron in worker; reads finance_settings.d365_consolidation_cutoff_time per org.
   - Logic: per §12.3 pseudocode lines 1062-1078 verbatim.
     a) batch_date = today.
     b) Fetch pending wo_cost.closed events from previous day window.
     c) GROUP BY (cost_center_id, currency_id, gl_account) → consolidated lines.
     d) INSERT single finance_outbox_events row event_type='finance.daily_journal.ready', target_system='d365_f&o', aggregate_id=batch_id, payload={lines:[...], journal_date}, target_payload=null (filled by adapter at dispatch).
     e) Mark original per-WO events as status='consolidated' (terminal).
   - V-FIN-INT-07 warn: if 0 lines produced, log + audit.
   - Idempotent: query existing daily_journal.ready row for batch_date before producing.
2. `packages/d365-finance-adapter/src/index.ts`:
   - Reads `gl_account_mappings` (T-003) + `d365_constants` (02-SETTINGS §11) at adapter call time.
   - Builds payload per §12.4 lines 1106-1140 verbatim.
   - Stamps idempotencyKey from finance_outbox_events.idempotency_key (R14).
   - Signs payload SHA-256 for webhook signature.
   - Throws typed errors mapped to error_category (transient / permanent / schema / d365_validation).
3. `apps/worker/src/finance/d365-dispatcher.ts`:
   - Subscribes to finance_outbox_events polling status='pending' / status='failed' WHERE next_retry_at <= now() AND target_system='d365_f&o'.
   - Calls adapter → POSTs to D365 (env: D365_DMF_ENDPOINT, D365_OAUTH_TOKEN from Azure Key Vault).
   - On HTTP success: status='delivered', delivered_at=now(), update work_order_costs.posted_to_d365_at + d365_journal_id (from response).
   - On HTTP failure: classify (per §12.5 table); if transient + attempt < 6: schedule next_retry_at per backoff; if permanent / schema / d365_validation: move to d365_finance_dlq.
   - Feature flag gate: `integration.d365.finance_posting.enabled` (PostHog + finance_settings.d365_integration_enabled).
4. Worker registration in `apps/worker/src/registry.ts`.

## Files
- apps/worker/src/finance/daily-consolidator.ts [create]
- apps/worker/src/finance/d365-dispatcher.ts [create]
- packages/d365-finance-adapter/package.json [create]
- packages/d365-finance-adapter/src/index.ts [create]
- packages/d365-finance-adapter/src/__tests__/adapter.test.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0062_pg_cron_finance.sql [create] (pg_cron schedule registration)
- apps/worker/src/finance/__tests__/daily-consolidator.test.ts [create]
- apps/worker/src/finance/__tests__/d365-dispatcher.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given 50 wo_cost.closed events across 3 cost_centers, when consolidator runs, then 1 daily_journal.ready row with consolidated lines per (cost_center, currency, gl_account) emitted; 50 originals marked status='consolidated'. AND given consolidator runs twice for same batch_date, when second run executes, then no duplicate daily_journal.ready row (idempotent).
- Given 0 wo_cost.closed events, when consolidator runs, then V-FIN-INT-07 warn + audit 'daily_consolidation_empty'. AND given a daily_journal.ready with 200 lines, when adapter runs, then JournalBatchNumber='MONO-PROD-{yyyy-mm-dd}' and JournalName from gl_account_mappings.
- Given D365 503 (transient), when dispatcher commits, then status='failed', attempt_count++, next_retry_at = now()+5m. AND given D365 400 schema error, when dispatcher commits, then move to d365_finance_dlq with error_category='schema' immediately.
- Given dispatcher succeeds, when work_order_costs read, then posted_to_d365_at + d365_journal_id populated for batch WOs. AND given feature flag off, when dispatcher polls, then no D365 POST occurs. AND given 1000 events, when consolidator runs, then completes <60s (NFR §15.1).
_(AC count consolidated from 9→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: daily-consolidator.test.ts seeds 50 events; asserts consolidation grouping + idempotency + V-FIN-INT-07. d365-dispatcher.test.ts mocks D365 HTTP responses for transient / permanent / success / 503; asserts retry schedule + DLQ + posted_to_d365_at update. adapter.test.ts asserts payload mapping verbatim.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/worker vitest run finance/daily-consolidator finance/d365-dispatcher && pnpm --filter d365-finance-adapter vitest run`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not POST to D365 when feature flag off — events stay pending (graceful degradation).
- Do not retry permanent / schema / d365_validation errors — straight to DLQ.
- Do not double-consolidate (idempotent check before INSERT).
- Do not log D365 OAuth tokens.
- Do not use OAuth credentials outside Azure Key Vault (per §15.4).
- Do not deviate from §12.5 retry schedule exactly (6 attempts: immediate, +5m, +30m, +2h, +12h, +24h).
- Do not skip the reconciliation hook (T-028 covers consolidation+dispatch; reconciliation cron is acceptable to defer to a follow-up small task, but document the hook here).
- Do not block on D365 latency in user-facing actions — async only.

pipeline_inputs.description: Daily consolidator cron (23:00 UTC) groups wo_cost.closed events into single daily_journal.ready event + R15 adapter maps to D365 DMF + dispatcher worker handles HTTP delivery with retry schedule + DLQ classification.
pipeline_inputs.details: Implements §12.3 + §12.4 + §12.5 verbatim. Feature-flag-gated (integration.d365.finance_posting.enabled + finance_settings.d365_integration_enabled). Reuses 08-PROD §12 stage 2 outbox template structurally. R15 adapter is a new package @monopilot/d365-finance-adapter. OAuth tokens from Azure Key Vault. AND given consolidator runs twice for same batch_date, when second run executes, then no duplicate daily_journal.ready row (idempotent).

Given 0 wo_cost.closed events, when consolidator runs, then V-FIN-INT-07 warn + audit 'daily_consolidation_empty'. AND given a daily_journal.ready with 200 lines, when adapter runs, then JournalBatchNumber='MONO-PROD-{yyyy-mm-dd}' and JournalName from gl_account_mappings.

Given D365 503 (transient), when dispatcher commits, then status='failed', attempt_count++, next_retry_at = now()+5m. AND given D365 400 schema error, when dispatcher commits, then move to d365_finance_dlq with error_category='schema' immediately.

Given dispatcher succeeds, when work_order_costs read, then posted_to_d365_at + d365_journal_id populated for batch WOs. AND given feature flag off, when dispatcher polls, then no D365 POST occurs. AND given 1000 events, when consolidator runs, then completes <60s (NFR §15.1).
test_strategy: RED: daily-consolidator.test.ts seeds events + asserts grouping/idempotency/empty-warn. d365-dispatcher.test.ts mocks HTTP responses + asserts retry schedule + DLQ + status. adapter.test.ts asserts payload mapping.
Run pnpm --filter @monopilot/worker vitest run finance/daily-consolidator finance/d365-dispatcher && pnpm --filter d365-finance-adapter vitest run.
risk_red_lines: Do not POST to D365 when feature flag off.
Do not log D365 OAuth tokens.
Do not use OAuth credentials outside Azure Key Vault.
Do not deviate from §12.5 retry schedule.
Do not block user-facing actions on D365 latency.
D365 dispatcher is strictly export-only — it MUST NOT mutate `factory_release_state` or any canonical Monopilot state (R15 anti-corruption contract).
